response.original_title: I Parry Everything: What Do You Mean I’m the Strongest?
response.overview: Noor's dead set on becoming an adventurer, even if the only skills he possesses are useless ones. Sure, he can [Parry] thousands of swords in the span of a single breath, but you need more than that if you want to be an adventurer! Right?
response.title: I Parry Everything: What Do You Mean I’m the Strongest?
